devto.content:
---
title: "I Built AI API Gateway on a $35 Raspberry Pi (And It Runs 24/7)"
published: true
tags: [ai, automation, python, raspberrypi]
---

# AI API Gateway: 白标AI API转售平台。转售GPT-4o/Claude，30-50%利润。

I built AI API Gateway to I got tired of doing managing API keys and billing manually. So I automated it with AI.

## What It Does

- **OpenAI兼容:** 完全兼容OpenAI SDK
- **30-50%加价:** 你的定价-成本=你的利润
- **用量统计:** 实时Token统计
- **API Key管理:** 独立Key+限额
- **速率限制:** 内置rate limiting

## How It Works

The pipeline: (1) Cron triggers the engine, (2) Python fetches data, (3) AI processes it, (4) Output is generated and pushed to GitHub Pages. No cloud, no serverless, no Docker. Just a Pi.

## Why Raspberry Pi?

- 💰 **Cost:** $35 one-time. No AWS bills.
- ⚡ **Always on:** 24/7 cron automation
- 🌍 **Offline-capable:** No cloud dependency
- 🐍 **Python stdlib:** Zero external deps

## The Code

```python
# Zero-dependency thumbnail generator
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

img = Image.new("RGB", (1280, 720))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
draw.text((640, 360), "AI Generated", fill="white")
img.save("thumbnail.png")
```

## What's Next?

I got tired of doing managing API keys and billing manually. So I automated it with AI.

---

*This is part of my [20 AI Products Stack](https://ulnit.github.io/agent-store) — all running on a $35 Raspberry Pi.*

https://github.com/ulnit/ai-api-gateway
